'''Hargeeva''' was an [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] world, the third of five [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Pelonat system|Pelonat]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] located near [[Garen IV/Legends|Garen IV]]. Its [[Local day/Legends|local day]] was 23 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|standard]] [[Time/Legends|hours]] long, while its [[Standard year/Legends|year]] was 380 local days long. It was colonized in [[2000 BBY/Legends|2000 BBY]], but was neglected. Its society evolved to a feudal state. Nobles sent their sons to serve in the local royal guard for military training.

The planet's rich [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] deposits, including [[coralline]] and [[ostrine]], were later discovered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which subjugated the world, installing a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] and advanced refineries. The Empire made the local ruler, [[Makintay]], Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]]. The planet's six [[City/Legends|cities]] included the [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Arginall City]].<ref name="AJ" />

The first [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] uprising in Arginall City was led by [[Merak]] and [[Stevan Makintay]], the disinherited eldest son of the Governor.

Local [[Ketrian Altronel]] found a way to modify ostrine into a heat-absorbent. Ketrian defected to the Rebel Alliance and added her ostrine-derived absorbent to the housings of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] cannons, improving their firepower.<ref name="AJ" />
